commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=496dd09a332db6343d6c2825883779900936ce4a)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the heartbeat transcript filter to trim trailing unrecognized text-only assistant heartbeat output and adds regression coverage for trimming and preservation.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +24. Total +36 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. At source level, current main and v2026.5.22 preserve trailing unrecognized heartbeat output, and the linked report maps to the normal prompt path that filters session history before adding the current user prompt.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review of the text-only alert context policy; there is no safe automation-only repair while proof is missing.

target.title: fix: trim trailing heartbeat context when no user message follows
target.body:
## Summary

Models that do not produce a clean `HEARTBEAT_OK` token (e.g. DeepSeek V4) leave their heartbeat response in the transcript. The next real user message is then appended after this stale context, causing the agent to misidentify it as a heartbeat continuation.

`resolveHeartbeatArtifactSpanEnd` now trims unrecognized text-only assistant output when the heartbeat pair is the trailing turn. It only preserves non-standard heartbeat responses when a subsequent user message proves the user interacted with them, or when tool activity indicates the heartbeat did real work.

Closes #85614

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: first user message after heartbeat poll is misidentified as heartbeat continuation when the model does not emit a standard HEARTBEAT_OK token
Real environment tested: macOS 15.5, Node 24.2.0, local OpenClaw dev checkout
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.test.ts && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts
Evidence after fix: terminal output from running the heartbeat filter and context-engine integration tests after the patch:
```
$ pnpm test src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.test.ts
 ✓ |unit-fast| src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.test.ts (36 tests) 4ms
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  36 passed (36)

$ pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts
 ✓ |agents| src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts (47 tests) 507ms
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  47 passed (47)
```
Three new test cases cover the fix:
1. `removes trailing heartbeat output when no user message follows` - the core bug: a non-standard heartbeat response at transcript tail is now trimmed
2. `preserves meaningful heartbeat output when user interacts afterward` - user message after heartbeat response proves interaction, content preserved
3. `removes trailing heartbeat response without HEARTBEAT_OK token` - mixed transcript where heartbeat pair is at the end after real conversation

The context-engine integration test `preserves visible heartbeat alerts in normal prompt snapshots` (47 tests) confirms that heartbeat responses with tool activity (real work) are still preserved.

Observed result after fix: trailing text-only heartbeat responses are trimmed from the transcript so the next user message starts with clean context; heartbeat responses with tool calls or user follow-up are preserved
What was not tested: live multi-model heartbeat with DeepSeek V4 (requires deployment with that provider configured)
